PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetExpressionRelationImpl(EXPRESSION_RELATION)
    PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('each')
      PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
        PsiElement(()('(')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
        PsiElement())(')')

  PsiPuppetHashValueImpl(HASH_VALUE)
    PsiElement({)('{')
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
    PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
      Puppet: CLASS_DEFINITION
        PsiElement(CLASS)('class')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('myClass')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
          PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"This is restricted since only statements are allowed inside"')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiErrorElement:'=>' expected, got 'include'
        <empty list>
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('include')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(NAME)('myClass')
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
    PsiElement(})('}')
